[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. Easter Banners # Easter Banners ### Custom Easter Banners ![Custom Easter Banner | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/f2053c5c08f840feacd65a9a4b305a89.jpg) * [Finishing Options](#0968c789-18fb-4d4b-91cc-2d5e36947734) * [Order Process](#ba3da710-edff-4261-a757-922c1d6f5ca6) * [Production Times](#a32656e3-94e4-4f12-b4e0-4df466adbb58) * [Shipping](#e90a1c7b-3de0-4f14-8c61-332f8506cbb7) ### Easter Banner Finishing Options The standard finishing option for Easter banners is heat welded hems and grommets every 2-4 feet around the banner perimeter. You will not need to add any bleeds on your artwork. We will add the extra material when we print your banner. #### Additional Finishing Options * 2" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 3/4" in diameter * 3" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter * 4" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter * Reinforced Corners * Reinforced Hems By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner. Pole pockets can either be 2", 3" or 4". We don't recommend having any text or images within 3 inches of the edge of the banner when you select pole pockets. \*\*Pole Pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners. Reinforced corners are not available on banners under 2 feet in height. **Hems & Grommets** **Reinforced Hems** **Reinforced Corners** **Pole Pockets** ![Vinyl Banners Hems and Grommet Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/291886d1-dd6d-4fdf-9f62-c5b6826dba17.jpg) ![Vinyl Banner Reinforced Hem Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Reinforced-Hems-for-Vinyl-Banners.jpg) ![Vinyl Banner Reinforced Corner Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Reinforced Corners for Vinyl Banners.jpg) ![Vinyl Banner Pole Pocket Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/728828a0-b142-4abc-98ec-5b404600dca9.jpg) #### Two Sided Banner Finishing We can finish two sided banners up to 150 square feet. For anything larger, please contact us. Double sided banners can only have pole pockets or hems and grommet finishing. [Visit our banner finishing options page](https://www.banners.com/vinyl-banner-finishing-options) for more information about the vinyl banner finishing options we offer. _We do not recommend wind slits in banners, therefore we do not offer them. For more information as to why, [visit our page on wind slits](https://www.banners.com/wind-slits)._ ### Three Ways to Order Easter Banners There are three ways you can order Easter banners online. 1. Pick an Easter Banner Template to Customize * Add a background, clip art images, text or upload your own graphics 2. Upload a File * For our complete artwork specifications, [visit our artwork specifications page](https://www.banners.com/artwork-specs) 3. Let Us Design * We have a team of graphic designers who can design a custom vinyl banner for you. Upload any artwork you want on your banner and provide instructions for us #### Payment Information All Easter banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express and Discover cards. We also accept checks. Checks must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see our blog.](https://banners-com.blogspot.com/2013/05/online-orders-we-now-accept-checks.html) If you have a purchase order, please contact a customer service representative for your options. We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your proof for your order

Step 2 - Upload Upload the image from your computer
